summary: Frontend-only testing of JeufJeulTECH platform. All 5 pages tested successfully. All core features working.

issues: Stats section with '500+ projets, 200+ clients, 50+ techniciens' present but navbar missing 'Contact' direct link - users access contact only via 'Devis Gratuit' button

critical_code_review_comments: Navbar is missing a direct 'Contact' navigation link - only 'Devis Gratuit' button routes to /contact. Minor UX consideration.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All pages load correctly: Home (/), Services (/services), À propos (/a-propos), Contact (/contact), Réalisations (/realisations). Contact form submission works showing 'Message envoyé!' success state. Devis Gratuit button navigates to /contact. Voir tous nos services navigates to /services. Footer visible on dark navy with service links. Stats (10+, 500+, 200+) visible. Sticky glassmorphism navbar confirmed working.
